summary: Iteration 8 - Release readiness (Stripe Checkout on /advertising, Reward unlock notif, regression on admin/rewards). All 4 backend pytest cases PASS and all frontend criteria PASS. No regression. Stripe sk_test_emergent issues a real cs_test_... session URL; payment_transactions row is persisted. Reward-tier=1 flow correctly creates an in-app 'reward_unlocked' notification (referral_count: 0 -> 1, title '🎁 Première invitation débloqué !'). Resend email is mocked (RESEND_API_KEY absent) — only the in-app side is verified, as instructed.
passed_tests: BE ✅ GET /api/advertising/packages → 200, 18 packages (>=15), each has package_id/name/amount/type

BE ✅ POST /api/payments/checkout {marketplace_7days, origin, user_id} → 200, checkout_url starts with https://checkout.stripe.com/, session_id present, payment_transactions row inserted in MongoDB (status=pending, amount_xpf=1000, amount_eur=8.38)

BE ✅ Referral reward unlock — register a new user with referral_code=32ZTFSAR triggers (a) in-app notification type='reward_unlocked' with title starting '🎁 Première invitation' for demo user, data.tier_code='first_referral'; (b) demo referral_count==1. Cleaned up after.
FE ✅ /advertising — login demo, 18 [data-testid="buy-package-*"] buttons present, [data-testid="buy-package-marketplace_7days"] visible AND enabled
FE ✅ /rewards (demo) — H1 visible, 5/5 [data-testid="reward-tier-*"] tiles present (first_referral, ambassadeur, free_boost_7d, vendor_pro_1m, vip_status)
FE ✅ /admin/email-stats — H1 'Statistiques Emails', [data-testid="admin-email-refresh"] + [data-testid="admin-email-period"] present, KPI labels rendered

FE ✅ /admin/insights — H1 'Analytics & Insights', 4 KPI cards (Utilisateurs=37, Nouveaux Users=0, Nouvelles Publications=3, Articles RSS=113), TOP PUBLICATIONS=3, RÉPARTITION PAR ÎLE (Tahiti 20 / Moorea 2 / Bora-Bora 1), insights-refresh + insights-period testids present
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L863-893: REWARD_TIERS is referenced at L864 but defined later at L2070 — protected by `except NameError: pass`. Works because the registration handler runs at request time (module is fully loaded), but the fallback `pass` would silently swallow any future reordering bug. Recommend moving REWARD_TIERS above the registration handler or importing it from a constants module.

server.py L6691: HTTP 500 is raised with raw Stripe error string (`detail=f'Erreur de paiement: {str(e)}')`. This can leak internal/API details to the client. Sanitize before returning and log the raw error server-side only.

AdvertisingPage.js — `handlePayment` should disable all sibling buttons while loading to prevent double-charge if user double-clicks. The single `disabled={loading}` flag does cover this but ensure `loading` is reset in error paths (verify no race condition).

Email side-effect: when RESEND_API_KEY is missing (current local env), `email_service.send_reward_unlocked` returns False silently. OK for sandbox but make sure production env on Render does have it set — add a startup log warning if absent.
Backend tests created in /app/backend/tests/test_release_features.py — uses MongoClient direct access for verification. Future CI must mount /app and have MONGO_URL+REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported.
seed_data_creation: Test created a temporary user `reftest_<uuid>@example.com` then deleted it; reset demo user referral_count back to 0 and cleared its reward_unlocked/new_referral notifications. One leftover Stripe pending row in db.payment_transactions for session_id=cs_test_... (expected, simulates abandoned cart).

mocked_apis_list: Resend email API — RESEND_API_KEY not set in local backend/.env, so email_service.send_reward_unlocked() returns False silently. Only the in-app notification side of the reward unlock flow is asserted. The real Resend send will fire on Render where RESEND_API_KEY is configured.
Stripe — uses sk_test_emergent test key; checkout URLs are real https://checkout.stripe.com/ test sessions, no charge.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Release-ready as of iteration 8. New regression test file at /app/backend/tests/test_release_features.py covers: ad packages list, Stripe checkout (success + 400), referral→reward_unlocked notification. Run with: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) MONGO_URL=mongodb://localhost:27017 DB_NAME=nati_fenua python3 -m pytest backend/tests/test_release_features.py -v`. The test self-cleans (deletes temp user, resets demo referral_count). If re-running, the prior iteration-7 ObjectId bug on /api/referral/me is RESOLVED (referral_code endpoint now returns clean JSON). Front-end onboarding splash still overlays /advertising on first visit but is auto-dismissed by clicking 'Passer' — handled in test script.
rca_of_the_issue: No bug. All target features behave as specified.
